title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlueStone - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlueStone - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, BlueStone in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BlueStone:
BlueStone is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone!
